title: The Blue Light
lines: A soldier, tired of military life, deserted the army and wandered as a beggar.
An old woman gave him a flint stone with a blue light.
Whenever he struck the stone, a coal-black dwarf appeared to serve him.
Using this magical power, the soldier became rich and was eventually imprisoned by the king.
From his cell, he struck the stone and summoned the dwarf, who brought the king to him.
The soldier freed himself and took the king's daughter as a bride.
Years later, his wife found the stone and discovered its power.
She summoned the dwarf and ordered him to carry her away to a distant land.
The soldier, realizing what had happened, struck the stone once more and summoned the dwarf.
The dwarf rescued his wife and they lived happily once more.
